capability_questions.capability_name: Service Exists and in good condition

questions.prompt: Is there a compliance management service defined in the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a compliance management service is defined in the enterprise
questions.evaluation_focus: Compliance management service defined in the enterprise

questions.prompt: Is the service frequently reviewed for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the compliance management service is frequently reviewed for efficacy
questions.evaluation_focus: Service reviewed frequently for efficacy

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise use a compliance management software to monitor the compliance enterprise wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate use of compliance management software for enterprise-wide monitoring
questions.evaluation_focus: Compliance management software for enterprise-wide monitoring

questions.prompt: Is compliance tracked across all the enterprise and subsidiaries or is it restricted to a specific scope within the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate scope of compliance tracking across enterprise and subsidiaries
questions.evaluation_focus: Scope across enterprise and subsidiaries

questions.prompt: Is compliance management and scanning automated by the software? Or is there an automation in place for capturing compliance information?
questions.intent: Evaluate automation of compliance management, scanning, and information capture
questions.evaluation_focus: Automation for compliance management and scanning

questions.prompt: Is the software configuration reviewed frequently to align with business?
questions.intent: Evaluate frequent review of software configuration to align with business
questions.evaluation_focus: Software configuration reviewed to align with business

questions.prompt: Does the compliance management software integrate with a decision point or other technologies in the network to aid in attribute based decision making?
questions.intent: Evaluate integration with decision points and network technologies for attribute-based decisions
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with decision points and network technologies

questions.prompt: Can enterprise compliance software scan assets for compliance?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether compliance software can scan assets for compliance
questions.evaluation_focus: Software can scan assets for compliance

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy compliance scanning for all assets across all locations?
questions.intent: Evaluate deployment of compliance scanning for all assets across all locations
questions.evaluation_focus: Scanning deployed for all assets across all locations

questions.prompt: Is compliance scanning automated?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether compliance scanning is automated
questions.evaluation_focus: Compliance scanning automated

questions.prompt: Can the scan results be integrated with remediation software to enhance automatic remediation?
questions.intent: Evaluate integration of scan results with remediation software
questions.evaluation_focus: Scan results integrated with remediation software

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an established, documented compliance management process?
questions.intent: Evaluate established documented compliance management process
questions.evaluation_focus: Established documented compliance management process

questions.prompt: Is compliance management process implemented enterprise wide? or within a specific scope?
questions.intent: Evaluate enterprise-wide vs scoped implementation of compliance management process
questions.evaluation_focus: Process implemented enterprise-wide or scoped

questions.prompt: Is there automation incorporated into the process?
questions.intent: Evaluate automation incorporated into the compliance management process
questions.evaluation_focus: Automation incorporated into the process

questions.prompt: Is the compliance management process reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate frequent review of the compliance management process
questions.evaluation_focus: Process reviewed frequently

capability_questions.capability_name: Compliance Alignment to Standards and regulations

questions.prompt: Has the enterprise officially documented all the relevant standards and regulations that requires alignment?
questions.intent: Evaluate official documentation of relevant standards and regulations
questions.evaluation_focus: Official documentation of relevant standards and regulations

questions.prompt: How frequently are the relevant compliance requirements reviewed?
questions.intent: Evaluate frequency of review of relevant compliance requirements
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent review of compliance requirements

questions.prompt: Has the enterprise officially designed and documented the compliance metrics?
questions.intent: Evaluate official design and documentation of compliance metrics
questions.evaluation_focus: Officially designed and documented compliance metrics

questions.prompt: How frequently are the compliance metrics reviewed?
questions.intent: Evaluate frequency of review of compliance metrics
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent review of compliance metrics

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have compliance management teams that manage the overall compliance management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate compliance management teams managing the overall service
questions.evaluation_focus: Compliance management teams manage the overall service

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise hire/already hired policy and compliance specialists as part of the compliance teams?
questions.intent: Evaluate policy and compliance specialists on compliance teams
questions.evaluation_focus: Policy and compliance specialists on compliance teams

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an endpoint compliance policy formalized and documented?
questions.intent: Evaluate formal documented endpoint compliance policy
questions.evaluation_focus: Formal documented endpoint compliance policy

questions.prompt: Does the endpoint compliance policy apply to all devices across all locations or does it apply to a specific scope?
questions.intent: Evaluate scope of endpoint compliance policy across devices and locations
questions.evaluation_focus: Policy scope across devices and locations

questions.prompt: Is the endpoint compliance policy reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate frequent review of endpoint compliance policy
questions.evaluation_focus: Endpoint compliance policy reviewed frequently

questions.prompt: Is there a formal documented process on hardening applications inline with compliance?
questions.intent: Evaluate formal documented application hardening process aligned with compliance
questions.evaluation_focus: Application hardening process and coverage

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise harden all its application assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether all application assets are hardened
questions.evaluation_focus: Application hardening process and coverage

questions.prompt: Is the application asset hardening part of development and subsequently the deployment phase?
questions.intent: Evaluate application hardening in development and deployment phases
questions.evaluation_focus: Application hardening process and coverage

questions.prompt: Is the hardening and subsequent patching automated for applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate automated hardening and patching for applications
questions.evaluation_focus: Application hardening process and coverage

questions.prompt: Is the application hardening process reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate frequent review of application hardening process
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent review of hardening processes

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formal documented process for device hardening?
questions.intent: Evaluate formal documented device hardening process
questions.evaluation_focus: Endpoint and device hardening aligned to compliance

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise harden all its endpoint and device assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether all endpoint and device assets are hardened
questions.evaluation_focus: Endpoint and device hardening aligned to compliance

questions.prompt: Is the device hardening inline with compliance metrics and compliance management process?
questions.intent: Evaluate device hardening alignment with compliance metrics and process
questions.evaluation_focus: Endpoint and device hardening aligned to compliance

questions.prompt: Is the device hardening and subsequent patching automated?
questions.intent: Evaluate automated device hardening and patching
questions.evaluation_focus: Endpoint and device hardening aligned to compliance

questions.prompt: Is device hardening process reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate frequent review of device hardening process
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent review of hardening processes

questions.prompt: Is there a formal documented process for network device hardening?
questions.intent: Evaluate formal documented network device hardening process
questions.evaluation_focus: Network asset hardening process and automation

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise harden all its network assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether all network assets are hardened
questions.evaluation_focus: Network asset hardening process and automation

questions.prompt: Is the hardening and subsequent patching automated for network assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate automated hardening and patching for network assets
questions.evaluation_focus: Network asset hardening process and automation

questions.prompt: Is the network hardening process reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate frequent review of network hardening process
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent review of hardening processes

questions.prompt: Is there a formal documented process for transporting compliance changes to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate formal documented process for transporting compliance changes to the SOC
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented process for transporting compliance changes to the SOC

questions.prompt: Is transport of compliance changes made securely to the SOC ?
questions.intent: Evaluate secure transport of compliance changes to the SOC
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure transport of compliance changes to the SOC

questions.prompt: Are dynamic changes to the compliance captured and transferred to the SOC ?
questions.intent: Evaluate capture and transfer of dynamic compliance changes to the SOC
questions.evaluation_focus: Dynamic compliance changes captured and transferred to the SOC
